excluded_regimes.HIGH_VOL: OOS sign-flip: IS +0.216R -> OOS -0.559R (cross_regime_validation 2026-04-17). Re-enable only after re-validation passes (deg <= 60% AND OOS exp >= 0.15R AND OOS trades >= 20).
excluded_regimes.CRISIS: Crisis regime: macro=crisis or vol>0.85+liquidity<0.2. Spreads blow out, fills become unmodellable. No live strategy is permitted to size into this regime.

notes: Add a regime by inserting `"<LABEL>": "<reason>"` under excluded_regimes. Remove a regime by deleting its key. The loader picks up edits on next call -- no restart needed.
